title: Modern Paintigs
description: Adds Modern 1024x pbr Paintings to minecraft
body:
**An Modern Painting Texture Pack made by me to replace the 16x default painting to 1024x - 2048x painting with Normal Maps to give them a slight depth**

**it includes various different style of painting like Architecture, Cars & Bike, Nature, Abstract Art and More. All of them being high resolution with PBR maps**
## Painting Item
![Painting Item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ffb9fbcf89932dbd8cef324c42e20dda5539dbee.jpeg)

**Check The Gallery for the Images of All the Paintings**
